homepage.heroHeadline: Reliable Garage Door Experts in Las Vegas
homepage.heroSubline: We keep your garage doors running smoothly in the desert heat. Local service you can trust for repairs, installations, and maintenance.
aboutText: Since 2012, Legacy Garage Door has been serving Las Vegas homes with honest, dependable garage door services. Founded by a local family, we understand how the extreme Nevada weather impacts your garage doors.

We approach every job with meticulous attention to detail and use only high-quality parts designed to withstand our desert climate. Our technicians are background-checked and trained to work efficiently in your home.
As active members of the Las Vegas community, we're committed to giving back through local youth sports sponsorships and veteran discounts. Your satisfaction is our family's reputation.

valueProps.title: Heat-Resistant Parts
valueProps.description: We use materials specifically rated for 120°F+ temperatures to prevent warping and deterioration.

valueProps.title: Same-Day Service
valueProps.description: Most repairs completed within 24 hours because we know you can't wait in our desert climate.

valueProps.title: Local Knowledge
valueProps.description: 12 years experience with Las Vegas' unique housing stock from vintage homes to new builds.

valueProps.title: Transparent Pricing
valueProps.description: No surprise fees - we provide clear quotes before any work begins.

homepage.ctaSubline: Call 555-GAR-R94 for fast, friendly garage door solutions across the Las Vegas valley.

services.name: Garage Door Repair
services.shortDescription: Fast fixes for broken springs, off-track doors, and opener malfunctions in the Vegas heat.
services.description:
When your garage door stops working in Las Vegas' extreme temperatures, you need solutions fast. Our technicians specialize in diagnosing and repairing all types of garage door issues common to our area - from broken torsion springs (which fail more frequently in our heat) to misaligned tracks caused by shifting foundations in our poor soil conditions.

We carry a complete inventory of heat-rated replacement parts in our service vans to complete most repairs in a single visit. Whether it's a sensor alignment issue from dust storms or a worn-out gear in your opener from constant use, we'll identify the root cause and explain your options before making any repairs.
process: Step 1: Thorough inspection of door, tracks, springs, and opener components
Step 2: Explanation of issues found with digital photos if needed
Step 3: Immediate repair using climate-appropriate parts when possible
Step 4: Safety testing and lubrication of all moving parts
benefits: Same-day service for most common issues
Technicians trained on all major brands
No service fees if we can't fix it

faq.question: Why do my garage door springs keep breaking?
faq.answer: Las Vegas' extreme temperature swings cause metal fatigue. We install high-cycle springs rated for 25,000+ uses that better withstand our climate.

faq.question: Can you fix my opener remote that stopped working?
faq.answer: Yes! We reprogram or replace remotes affected by signal interference common in dense neighborhoods like Summerlin or Henderson.

services.name: New Garage Door Installation
services.shortDescription: Energy-efficient door installations designed for Nevada's punishing sun exposure.
services.description:
Upgrading your garage door in Las Vegas isn't just about curb appeal - it's about protecting your home from extreme UV rays and dust storms. We specialize in installing insulated garage doors with UV-resistant finishes that won't fade or peel after one summer.

Our selection includes doors specifically designed for Southern Nevada's architectural styles, from contemporary designs for newer Summerlin homes to traditional raised-panel options that complement vintage Las Vegas properties. Every installation includes proper sealing to keep out our fine desert dust and proper balancing to account for temperature fluctuations that can affect operation.
process: Step 1: Free consultation to discuss style, insulation, and material options
Step 2: Precise measurement of your opening accounting for potential foundation shifts
Step 3: Professional removal and disposal of your old door
Step 4: Installation with upgraded hardware for durability
benefits: 15+ styles to match your home's architecture

faq.question: What's the best garage door material for Las Vegas?
faq.Answer: Steel with thermal breaks and UV-resistant finishes performs best here, though we also offer fiberglass options for coastal-style homes.

services.name: Preventative Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Proactive care to extend your garage door's life in harsh desert conditions.
services.description:
The desert climate is brutal on garage doors - between the dust, heat, and UV exposure, components wear out faster here than in milder climates. Our bi-annual maintenance program helps Henderson and Las Vegas homeowners avoid costly repairs by catching small issues before they become big problems.

Our 25-point inspection covers everything from lubricating bearings (using high-temp grease) to checking weatherstripping for brittleness caused by sun exposure. We adjust spring tension seasonally as temperature changes affect metal contraction, and clean photo-eye sensors that get obscured by our frequent dust storms. Members of our maintenance program receive priority scheduling and 10% discounts on any needed repairs.
process: Step 1: Complete visual inspection of all door components
Step 2: Cleaning and lubrication of all moving parts
Step 3: Safety system testing including auto-reverse
Step 4: Detailed report with recommended actions
benefits: Reduces repair needs by up to 70%

faq.question: How often should I service my garage door in Las Vegas?
faq.answer: We recommend every 6 months - before summer's extreme heat and after winter's cooler temperatures when components contract.

services.name: Garage Door Opener Installation
services.shortDescription: Quiet, reliable opener installations with smart home compatibility.
services.description:
Modern garage door openers need to withstand Las Vegas' extreme conditions while providing convenient features homeowners expect. We install belt-drive openers that operate quietly (important for homes near busy areas like the Strip) and include battery backups for power outages during our summer monsoons.

Our technicians are certified to install all major brands and can integrate new openers with your smart home system. We pay special attention to proper sensor alignment, which can be affected by our intense sunlight causing false triggers. Every installation includes programming of your existing remotes and keypads, plus we'll show you how to use the smartphone app features.
process: Step 1: Assessment of your garage structure and electrical setup
Step 2: Removal of old opener (we recycle properly)
Step 3: Professional mounting and alignment
Step 4: Full testing and customer demonstration

faq.question: Why does my garage door opener work inconsistently?
faq.answer: In Las Vegas, heat can cause expansion in mounting brackets and sunlight can interfere with sensors. We'll secure all components and shade sensors if needed.

services.name: 24/7 Emergency Service
services.shortDescription: Round-the-clock repairs when you can't secure your home.
services.description:
When your garage door won't close at night or breaks during a dust storm, you need immediate help. Our emergency team is available 24/7 to secure your home, with most calls responded to within 90 minutes in the Las Vegas metro area.

We understand the urgency - an open garage door is both a security risk and invites scorpions and other desert pests inside. Our emergency vans carry temporary securing solutions if parts aren't immediately available, and we follow up the next business day to complete permanent repairs. Common emergency calls include broken springs (especially during temperature swings), off-track doors from wind storms, and opener failures during power fluctuations.
process: Step 1: Immediate phone assessment to determine urgency
Step 2: On-site evaluation and temporary solution if needed
Step 3: Explanation of repair options and costs
Step 4: Permanent repair scheduled if parts required
benefits: No extra charge for after-hours service

faq.question: What constitutes a garage door emergency?
faq.answer: Any situation where your door won't close and secure your home qualifies, especially in high-wind conditions or extreme temperatures.

reviews.name: Megan T.
reviews.text: Our garage door spring snapped during a 110° heat wave. Legacy had a technician out in 2 hours who replaced it with a heavy-duty model they said would last longer in our climate. Super professional and explained exactly why the original failed.

reviews.name: Robert K.
reviews.text: We needed a door that could handle the afternoon sun on our west-facing garage in Henderson. The team suggested a steel door with special insulation and UV coating. Two years later it still looks brand new despite the brutal sun exposure.

reviews.name: Linda S.
reviews.text: The bi-annual maintenance has saved us so much money. They caught worn rollers before they damaged the track, and their high-temp lubricant actually lasts between visits unlike the hardware store stuff I used to use.

reviews.name: David P.
reviews.text: Our garage door got stuck open during a dust storm at 9pm. Legacy's emergency tech arrived quickly, secured the door temporarily, then came back first thing next morning with the right parts to fix it permanently. Lifesavers!

reviews.name: Aisha M.
reviews.text: The new opener they installed is so much quieter than our old one, and the battery backup gives me peace of mind during summer thunderstorms. App control works perfectly with my smart home setup too.

reviews.name: Carlos R.
reviews.text: Fixed our off-track door in Summerlin quickly and explained how our soil shifting might require occasional adjustments. Appreciate their honest advice about when to repair vs. replace.

service-areas.title: Garage Door Service Areas Near Las Vegas | Legacy
service-areas.description: We serve Henderson, Summerlin, North Las Vegas and surrounding communities with reliable garage door services.

serviceAreas.content: Legacy Garage Door proudly serves Henderson, NV, providing top-tier garage door installation, repair, and maintenance services to its growing communities. With extreme summer heat often exceeding 115°F, our durable, heat-resistant garage doors are designed to withstand the harsh desert climate. Whether you're in Green Valley or Anthem, our team ensures fast, reliable service to keep your garage functioning smoothly year-round. Many Henderson homes built from the 1990s to the 2020s feature modern garage door systems that require expert care—trust our local specialists for all your needs.
serviceAreas.localContext: Henderson is known for its master-planned communities, offering a mix of suburban comfort and modern amenities.

serviceAreas.content: Legacy Garage Door is your trusted provider for garage door services in North Las Vegas, NV, where affordable newer construction homes dominate the landscape. The extreme summer heat, often surpassing 115°F, can take a toll on garage doors, making regular maintenance essential. We specialize in energy-efficient and weather-resistant solutions tailored for the local climate. From quick repairs to full replacements, our team delivers prompt, professional service to neighborhoods like Aliante and Eldorado.
serviceAreas.localContext: North Las Vegas offers budget-friendly housing with rapid growth in residential developments.

serviceAreas.content: Serving the upscale communities of Summerlin, NV, Legacy Garage Door provides premium garage door solutions for luxurious homes built from the 1990s to the 2020s. Our expert team offers custom installations, smart garage door upgrades, and routine maintenance to protect your investment.
